LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BUYERLINK, INC.'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFFS UNOPPOSED MOTION TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED, EXCEPT THAT PLAINTIFF ITSELF MUST FILE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE ITS SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FORTHWITH BUT NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 2, 2025. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BUYERLINK, INC.'s Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiffs unopposed motion to file a second amended complaint is GRANTED, except that Plaintiff itself must file the amended complaint. Plaintiff shall file its Second Amended Complaint forthwith but no later than February 2, 2025.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Continued To Jan-23-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF BUYERLINK, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION NOTICE OF MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT is transferred to department 302 to be heard on January 23, 2025 at 9:30 a.m.

Judge: Charles F, Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Declaration Iso Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:26 am. and conluding at 9:31 am.

Plaintiff Buyerlink, Inc. is represented by Tanya Schierling, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Genpex LLC. not appearing.

The Court Orders the matter continued to allow plaintiff time to submitt evidence and amend the complaint.

The matter is continued to December 18, 2024 in Department 505 at 9:00 am. (D505)
